source_pr.title: planner: add more test cases for non-prep plan cache
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #36598

Problem Summary: planner: add more test cases for non-prep plan cache

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Planner non-prepared plan cache behavior/test updates, but no concrete flaky failure signature is captured.
failure_signature: No concrete flaky failure signature captured (plan-cache feature/test update)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR mainly adjusts non-prepared plan-cacheability rules (e.g., supported ORDER BY/GROUP BY forms, uncacheable functions) and updates/extends related tests. The case does not include a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization-only fix for an existing flaky test; keep as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Planner feature/behavior change with test updates but without a concrete flaky failure signature or targeted stabilization mechanism; keep as insufficient evidence.

evidence: evidence: "select a from t order by a", (planner/core/plan_cache_test.go)

analysis:

Triage summary: "select a from t order by a", (planner/core/plan_cache_test.go)
Changed files (4): expression/function_traits.go, planner/core/plan_cache_param.go, planner/core/plan_cache_test.go, planner/core/plan_cacheable_checker.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
